# .obstral.md — Runtime eval fixture

## Stack
Python + pygame + git

## Test Command
test_cmd: test -d maze_game_pygame/.git && test -f maze_game_pygame/README.md && test -f maze_game_pygame/game.py && test -f maze_game_pygame/main.py && test -f maze_game_pygame/test_game.py && cd maze_game_pygame && SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy python3 -m unittest -q 2>&1

## Development Rules
- Create the requested pygame repo under `tool_root/maze_game_pygame`
- Keep the maze gameplay logic small and testable in `maze_game_pygame/game.py`
- Run the configured test command before calling done
